top_signals.title: Japan's $6 Lunch Is Under Threat
top_signals.summary: The “Indian curry” lunch is a Japanese staple — and a steal at only 1,000 yen ($6.40) or so. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Gearoid Reidy explains why the beloved meal may be under threat. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
